interface.longDescription: Simplify contract management with intelligent automation powered by Docusign. Go beyond simple execution to make complex agreement workflows effortless. Use natural language to create and send a contract, instantly surface insights like renewal dates and key obligations, and automate workflows that keep your business moving faster and with less friction.
defaultPrompt: Find DocuSign envelopes waiting on me and summarize what needs action.
Search for agreements with a customer and pull signing status, recipients, and key dates.
Review recently completed envelopes and extract renewal or obligation dates.
